FabricationServiceTypeCatalogService

Discovers available Fabrication service type names from the active document's Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationConfiguration.

RevitFamilyTypeLookupService

Provides a cached lookup of type names (Autodesk.Revit.DB.FamilySymbol) contained in an external Revit family file (.rfa) by opening the family document, extracting symbol names, and then closing it.
